description: M-26-14 Appendix C Element 4 Level 4 — Hot/Frozen retention WITHOUT automatic delete phase. Hot tier (0-180d) = searchable. Frozen tier via Searchable Snapshots (180d+) = retrievable. Use this policy when deploying the WS6 two-gate retirement workflow. Retirement (snapshot deletion) is controlled externally by the m_26_14-retirement-trigger-watcher after two-gate approval. Do NOT use the auto-delete variant (m_26_14-logs-l4-hot-frozen.json) alongside WS6.
